name: ai-radio
description: radioGAGA — AI-powered 24/7 radio station at radiogaga.ai

scripts.radio: concurrently --names icecast,ollama,backend,frontend --prefix-colors cyan,yellow,green,blue "npm run icecast" "npm run ollama" "npm run dev" "npm run frontend"

systemDependencies._comment: These must be installed on the host system
systemDependencies.ffmpeg: with libmp3lame — audio processing and streaming
systemDependencies.icecast: brew install icecast / apt install icecast2 — audio streaming server
systemDependencies.python3: with torch, transformers, scipy, numpy — for MusicGen
